---
title: "Welcome To My Statistics & Data Analysis Portfolio"
---

## Portfolio Projects

[Fiscal Characteristics of Major US Public Transit Systems](https://cliu98.github.io/STA9750-2024-FALL/mp01.html)  


[The Business of Show Business](https://cliu98.github.io/STA9750-2024-FALL/mp02.html)

[Do Proportional Electoral College Allocations Yield a More Representative Presidency?](https://cliu98.github.io/STA9750-2024-FALL/mp03.html)

[Monte Carlo-Informed Selection of CUNY Retirement Plans](https://cliu98.github.io/STA9750-2024-FALL/mp04.html)

[Does a Country’s Geographic Characteristics Affect Performance at the Olympics?](https://cliu98.github.io/STA9750-2024-FALL/individual_report.html)

[Olympic Success Analysis: General Group Report Findings](https://cliu98.github.io/STA9750-2024-FALL/olympic-advantage.html)

## About Me
### **Chris Liu**

I am currently attending Baruch College in the Zicklin School of Business with an anticipated graduation of May 2026. I am pursuing a MS in Statistics with a focus in data science. I hope to pursue a career within statistical machine learning after graduation. If you're interested in getting connected, here is my [LinkedIn profile.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-liu-80b157162/)

I graduated with a B.S. in Mechanical Engineering from Boston University in 2021. Some of my previous work done in my undergraduate courses can be found here in my [mechanical engineering project portfolio.](https://lhxian.wixsite.com/mysite/me360-product-design-spring-2020)
